form.formComment: Most recently 5th of 8 at Caulfield Heath Bm66 on March 18 over 1200m, 2.5 len behind Eternal carrying 58.5kg at $6.50. The race before that ran on from midfield and won by 0.8 len at Sandown-Hillside 3yo Mdn-Sw February 25 over 1300m on a rain affected track defeating Shoma carrying 58kg at $3.60. Useful type and worth another chance.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Returns from a 29-day let-up. Most recently won by 2.75 len at Pakenham Mdn-Sw March 12 over 1400m defeating Cavalry with 59.5kg at $9. The race before that held ground to the line 2nd of 9 at Kyneton 4yo+ Mdn-Sw on February 27 over 1479m, slow going nose behind Pick Wisely carrying 59.5kg at $8.50. Have to respect again.

form.formComment: Last start 4th of 7 at Carrathool Cl2 on March 28 over 1400m, 9 len behind Hollerloud carrying 55kg at $15. Prefer to see her back in form.
